header.focusBody: Keep the session narrow and repeatable.
header.signedInBody: Protected progress and admin routes stay separated by role.
header.anonymousBody: You can browse lessons and study without saved progress.
header.mobileDescription: Navigate lessons, articles, review pages, and admin tools.

home.title: Learn Chinese at your own pace
home.description: Lessons, vocabulary, grammar, and focused practice in one calm workspace.

lessons.title: Structured lessons
lessons.description: Move through curated lesson paths with vocabulary and grammar together.

dashboard.title: Progress dashboard
dashboard.description: Track review status, lesson completion, and what to study next.

review.title: Review queue
review.description: Clear due words with a lightweight focused session.

settings.title: Settings
settings.description: Adjust language, theme, and study preferences over time.

admin.title: Admin workspace
admin.description: Manage curriculum content with draft and publish controls.

lessonDetail.title: Lesson detail
lessonDetail.description: Review vocabulary and grammar before starting the focused study flow.

studySession.title: Study session
studySession.description: A high-focus learning surface for flashcards, multiple choice, and typing.

home.title: A calmer way to build Chinese vocabulary, grammar, and daily consistency
home.description: Browse public lessons, start practicing immediately, and unlock saved progress when you are ready. The experience stays focused, readable, and structured around one clear next step.

stats.modesDescription: Flashcard, multiple choice, and typing practice in one platform.
stats.structureDescription: Each lesson blends vocabulary and pattern recognition instead of isolating them.
stats.toneDescription: Quiet surfaces, sharp hierarchy, and a dark study panel for practice sessions.

studyPath.title: Move from browsing to deliberate practice without friction
studyPath.description: Public pages help learners explore lessons, vocabulary, and grammar before signing in. Protected pages add saved progress, settings, and admin content management without changing the mental model of the app.
studyPath.browseBody: Open lessons, words, and grammar by level or topic.
studyPath.practiceBody: Switch modes without losing the context of the lesson.
studyPath.reviewBody: Save progress later when you are ready to track it.

focusPanel.title: Designed for concentration, not clutter
focusPanel.description: Practice surfaces keep the prompt central, controls large, and supporting information secondary so the learner can stay inside the exercise.

lessons.title: Follow a structured lesson path
lessons.description: Lessons combine published vocabulary and grammar into one clear entry point before learners move into the focused study shell.
lessons.emptyTitle: No published lessons match these filters
lessons.emptyDescription: Try another topic or HSK level to widen the published lesson list.
lessons.reviewContentFirst: Review the lesson content here first, then move into the learner shell when ready.
lessons.noLessonWordsDescription: This lesson is published, but its public vocabulary composition is still empty.
lessons.noLessonGrammarDescription: This lesson is published, but its public grammar composition is still empty.

vocabulary.title: Words designed for quick recognition and clean reading
vocabulary.description: Browse published vocabulary with clear Hanzi, pinyin, Hán Việt, and meaning, then jump into the learner shell when you are ready.
vocabulary.emptyTitle: No published words match these filters
vocabulary.emptyDescription: Try a different HSK level, topic, or radical filter to widen the results.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by hanzi, pinyin, meaning, or slug

vocabulary.noLearningHints: No extra study notes have been added for this word yet.
vocabulary.noExamples: No public examples have been published for this word yet.

grammar.title: Grammar patterns explained with clear structure
grammar.description: Browse published structure patterns, explanations, and examples before entering focused lesson practice.
grammar.emptyTitle: No published grammar points match these filters
grammar.emptyDescription: Try a different HSK level or reset the filter to browse all public grammar content.
grammar.noExamples: No public examples have been published for this grammar point yet.

articles.title: Study notes for vocabulary, grammar, and usage
articles.description: Browse longer learning notes, word comparisons, and explanation articles designed for careful reading and review.
articles.emptyTitle: No published articles match these filters
articles.emptyDescription: Try a different keyword, level, type, or tag to widen the article list.
articles.overviewDescription: A quick summary of article type, study level, tags, and your reading status.
articles.relatedWordsDescription: Vocabulary entries linked to this article for quick follow-up review.
articles.relatedGrammarDescription: Grammar references connected to this article.
articles.noRelatedWords: No related words have been linked to this article yet.
articles.noRelatedGrammar: No related grammar points have been linked to this article yet.
articles.anonymousHint: Anonymous learners can read published articles, but bookmarks and reading history are saved only after sign-in.

header.title: Google Sheets vocabulary sync
header.description: Preview staged vocabulary rows, inspect AI-generated changes, and approve or reject them. Approved rows sync into production immediately.

empty.noResolvedRowsDescription: No rows have been approved, rejected, or applied yet. Choose a batch from history or process rows from the review queue.
empty.noQueueRows: No sync rows in review queue
empty.noQueueRowsDescription: Start a new preview or choose a batch from history to inspect its staged rows.
empty.noFilteredRows: No staged rows match the current filters
empty.noFilteredRowsDescription: Adjust the search or filter settings to widen the review queue.
empty.noHistoryDescription: Start your first preview to begin.
empty.noBatchRows: No sync rows found for this batch.
empty.noExamples: No examples added. Click "Add Example" to create one.

overview.globalQueueDescription: Showing all sync rows across batches that are still in `pending` or `needs_review`.
overview.globalResolvedDescription: Showing all sync rows across batches that are no longer in `pending` or `needs_review`.

stats.detailDescription: Detailed analytical insights and row distribution.

new.label: New
new.description: Rows with no production match yet.

changed.label: Changed
changed.description: Matched rows where meaningful content differs.

unchanged.label: Unchanged
unchanged.description: Rows auto-skipped because staged content already matches production.

conflict.label: Conflict
conflict.description: Rows that still need human disambiguation.

invalid.label: Invalid
invalid.description: Rows blocked by parse or validation issues.

approved.label: Approved
approved.description: Rows approved but not fully completed because sync is still pending or failed.

applied.label: Applied
applied.description: Rows already synced to production or skipped because data was unchanged.

rejected.label: Rejected
rejected.description: Rows rejected from the staged review queue.

batchSync.startDescription: Enter a spreadsheet ID and sheet name to pull rows into the staged review queue.
batchSync.spreadsheetHintRequired: Required if GOOGLE_SHEETS_DEFAULT_SPREADSHEET_ID is not set.
batchSync.sheetHintRequired: Required if GOOGLE_SHEETS_DEFAULT_SHEET_NAME is not set.
batchSync.historyDescription: Recent preview runs available for review.
batchSync.detailsDescription: Configuration and current status of the selected vocabulary preview run.

detail.title: Review row detail
detail.description: Inspect staged content and review the normalized payload for this sync row.

fields.topicTagsHint: Search and select from predefined categories

ambiguity.label: Mark as ambiguous
ambiguity.description: Requires manual review due to complex or multiple valid readings.

detail.resolvedNotice: This row has already been resolved. It is view-only and no further actions are available.
detail.pendingApplyNotice: This row has already been approved, but it is still pending apply. Run apply to create or update the production word and move this row to applied.
detail.conflictFallback: Multiple production matches found. Please disambiguate.

auth.title: Save progress without losing the public-first browsing flow
auth.description: Continue with Google to create or refresh your learner profile, unlock protected pages like Dashboard and Settings, and keep future review progress synced.
auth.anonymousVisitors: Anonymous visitors can still browse public lessons and preview the study flow first.

reasons.progress: Prepare for saved review progress in later phases.
reasons.routing: Keep role-based routing consistent for user and admin accounts.

learning.anonymousWarning: Studying works anonymously, but long-term progress is not saved.

studySession.description: Move through the lesson in study order. Switch modes whenever you want without losing your place.
studySession.completeDescription: You finished the lesson study pass. Review the summary below or restart the session.

reviewSession.title: Due words
reviewSession.description: Work through overdue and due-now words with the same study modes you use inside lessons.
reviewSession.completeDescription: You finished the due review items in this session. Return to the dashboard or browse more lessons to keep momentum going.

reviewPage.title: Due review queue
reviewPage.description: Clear the words that are due now or overdue, then return to lessons for fresh material.
reviewPage.emptyDescription: Your saved queue is clear. Continue a lesson to create more review items, or browse published lessons for something new.
reviewPage.suggestedDescription: Keep building the queue with published content.

emptyLesson.title: This lesson has no study words yet
emptyLesson.description: Return to the lesson overview and attach published vocabulary before starting a learner session.

emptyReview.title: Nothing is due right now
emptyReview.description: Your review queue is empty. Continue a lesson or browse the lesson library to add more study material.

practice.title: Focused reading and Hanzi writing practice
practice.description: Use public vocabulary and example sentences for reading, then switch into a simple canvas flow for handwriting practice.
practice.signInForReview: Sign in to open your personal review queue
practice.emptyTitle: Nothing is ready for practice yet
practice.signInNotice: Practice works anonymously, but progress is only saved after sign-in.
practice.signInToSave: Sign in to save practice progress

review.title: Review Queue
review.description: Clear due words, revisit difficult items, and keep your spaced repetition moving.

readingWords.title: Reading Words
readingWords.description: Practice recognition and pronunciation one word at a time.

readingSentences.title: Reading Sentences
readingSentences.description: Read example sentences with optional pinyin and meaning support.

writingHanzi.title: Writing Hanzi
writingHanzi.description: Trace and repeat each Hanzi with a simple writing canvas.

review.title: Your personalized review queue
review.description: Study words that are due now, revisit difficult items sooner, and pull in a few fresh words when the queue is light.
review.emptyTitle: Your review queue is clear for now
review.emptyDescription: There are no urgent review items right now. Continue a lesson or open reading practice to create the next loop.
review.suggestedDescription: Keep the queue growing with the next best published lessons.

reading.title: Choose a reading focus
reading.description: Switch between word and sentence practice without leaving the same calm study surface.
reading.wordsSessionDescription: Read published vocabulary with optional pinyin, meaning support, and quick text-to-speech playback.
reading.sentencesSessionDescription: Read example sentences, reveal support when needed, and flag difficult material for later.
reading.audioUnavailable: Audio playback is not available in this browser.
reading.saveFailed: Reading practice progress could not be saved.
reading.emptyDescription: Publish words or example sentences first to populate reading practice.
reading.pronunciationUnsupported: Speech recognition is not available in this browser yet.
reading.pronunciationDescription: Read the prompt aloud and compare your transcript with the expected Hanzi.

writing.title: Choose a Hanzi writing set
writing.description: Open a word, split it into characters, and rehearse each Hanzi on a simple canvas built for touch and tablet use.
writing.completeDescription: You finished the current writing set. Restart the word or return to the writing list for another one.
writing.saveFailed: Writing practice progress could not be saved.
writing.strokeGuideDescription: Use the faint reference character as a visual target while you build muscle memory.
writing.strokeGuideRule: For now, follow the common rule: top to bottom, left to right.

dashboard.title: Your study progress
dashboard.description: See what is due now, how your lesson path is moving, and where to focus next.
dashboard.wordsToReviewTodayDescription: Due or difficult words that need attention
dashboard.totalXpDescription: Experience earned from lessons, review, and practice
dashboard.currentLevelDescription: Your overall learner level from accumulated XP
dashboard.dailyGoalWidgetDescription: Keep the review loop alive with a small, consistent finish line.
dashboard.goalRemaining: {count} more action(s) to hit today's goal
dashboard.goalCompleted: Today's goal is complete. Keep going if you want to build buffer.
dashboard.gamificationDescription: A simple progress layer to make daily study more visible.
dashboard.completedArticlesDescription: Study notes you have finished reading
dashboard.noLessonProgressDescription: Start a lesson to unlock completion tracking, recent study history, and review recommendations.
dashboard.recentArticlesDescription: Your latest reading activity across published study notes.
dashboard.noArticleProgressDescription: Open a published article to start building a reading trail and bookmark list.
dashboard.reviewReadinessDescription: What needs attention before the day ends.
dashboard.dailyActivityDescription: Small momentum signals from recent review work.
dashboard.recentReviewDescription: Latest saved answers from your study sessions.

suggestedActionBodies.review: You have review pressure today, so clear that queue first.
suggestedActionBodies.lesson: Your next best step is finishing the lesson already in progress.
suggestedActionBodies.practice: Use lightweight reading practice to keep the learning loop moving.

dashboard.nextRecommendationDescription: A lightweight suggestion based on unfinished lessons and your current level.
dashboard.noRecommendationDescription: Finish or start a lesson to improve lesson suggestions.
dashboard.recommendedArticlesDescription: Published notes that match your current level or recent article tags.
dashboard.noRecommendedArticlesDescription: Read or bookmark an article first to improve article suggestions.
dashboard.recentPracticeActivityDescription: Latest saved reading and writing actions.
dashboard.noReviewActivityDescription: Review events will appear here after you finish a lesson or clear items from the review queue.
dashboard.noPracticeActivityDescription: Reading and writing actions will appear here after your first practice session.

explanation.loadFailed: The AI explanation could not be generated right now.
explanation.wordDescription: Meaning, usage, and subtle differences in Vietnamese.
explanation.grammarDescription: A Vietnamese grammar explanation with usage guidance.
explanation.articleDescription: A quick Vietnamese explanation of the key points in this article.
explanation.incorrectDescription: You missed this item. Review the meaning and usage before moving on.

sentences.title: AI example sentences
sentences.description: Generate 2-3 extra sentences with Hanzi, pinyin, and Vietnamese meaning.
sentences.practiceDescription: Pull a few extra AI-generated examples before marking this word done.
sentences.empty: Generate extra examples when you want more context.
sentences.loadFailed: AI examples could not be generated right now.

settings.title: Preferences and reading comfort
settings.description: Adjust language, theme, and reading style, then keep those preferences across your study and review surfaces.
settings.languageDescription: Choose the app language used across navigation, learning surfaces, and settings.
settings.languageHelp: Language updates immediately, preserves the current page, and is saved to your profile when signed in.
settings.languageSaveError: Language preference could not be saved.
settings.themeDescription: Choose a stable theme or follow the system appearance automatically.
settings.themeHelp: Theme updates apply immediately after save and stay consistent across dashboard, review, and study pages.
settings.fontDescription: Pick a reading style tuned specifically for Chinese characters.
settings.fontHelp: Sans keeps characters crisp; Serif provides a traditional look; Kai brings stroke shapes closer to handwriting, which helps with recognition.
settings.schedulerDescription: Choose the review algorithm that spaces your vocabulary over time.
settings.schedulerHelp: FSRS usually feels closer to modern Anki scheduling. Keep SM-2 if you want the safer legacy behavior.
settings.hardMeaningHelp: Use Hard when you remembered the word with difficulty. Use Again only when you failed or did not know it.
settings.retentionHelp: Higher retention means more reviews and shorter intervals. Lower retention reduces review load but increases forgetting risk.
settings.retentionWarning: Very high retention creates noticeably more daily reviews.
settings.maximumIntervalHelp: Caps the longest review interval the scheduler can assign.
settings.liveSummaryDescription: What will be applied right now.
settings.previewDescription: This preview is intentionally small, but the preference applies across the main reading and study surfaces.

errors.dashboardTitle: Dashboard data could not be loaded
errors.dashboardDescription: There was a problem reading your saved progress and review stats.
errors.lessonsDescription: A problem occurred while fetching published lesson content.
errors.vocabularyDescription: A problem occurred while fetching published vocabulary content.
errors.grammarTitle: Grammar content could not be loaded
errors.grammarDescription: A problem occurred while fetching published grammar content.
errors.reviewTitle: Review queue could not be loaded
errors.reviewDescription: There was a problem reading the due review items for your account.
errors.settingsDescription: There was a problem reading or preparing your saved preferences.
errors.learnLessonTitle: The lesson session could not be loaded
errors.learnLessonDescription: A problem occurred while preparing the learner study experience.
errors.adminImportDescription: The import tools could not be loaded. Try again or return to the admin vocabulary library.

notFound.title: This page does not exist
notFound.description: The address may be outdated, unpublished, or mistyped. Return to the lesson library or head back to the main workspace.
notFound.emptyDescription: Try a published lesson, dashboard, or home page instead.

learn.description: Study lesson vocabulary with flashcards, multiple choice, and typing. Signed-in learners save progress, while anonymous learners can practice without persistence.
learn.notReadyTitle: This lesson is not ready for study
learn.notReadyDescription: Attach published words to the lesson before starting a learner session.

overview.title: Content management
overview.description: Manage curriculum content, taxonomy, and lesson composition inside the protected workspace.

sections.wordsDescription: Manage vocabulary, examples, publish state, and taxonomy links.
sections.grammarDescription: Create grammar explanations, examples, and publishable lesson content.
sections.lessonsDescription: Compose ordered lesson content from words and grammar points.
sections.articlesDescription: Write and publish long-form study notes, comparisons, and usage articles.
sections.topicsDescription: Maintain lesson categories and content organization.
sections.radicalsDescription: Maintain Chinese radical reference data for vocabulary entries.
sections.contentSyncDescription: Review staged Google Sheets rows before any production apply step.

words.title: Vocabulary
words.description: Create, edit, publish, and organize vocabulary entries with attached examples.
words.emptyDescription: Create the first vocabulary entry to start building the library.

form.title: Word details
form.description: Use one example per line in the format: Chinese | Pinyin | Vietnamese meaning

create.title: New word
create.description: Create a vocabulary entry with optional taxonomy links and attached examples.

edit.description: Update vocabulary details, publish state, and examples.

deleteConfirm.title: Delete this word?
deleteConfirm.description: This will remove "{word}" ({slug}) from the library. This action cannot be undone.

grammar.title: Grammar points
grammar.description: Manage explanations, publish state, and example sentences for grammar content.
grammar.emptyDescription: Add the first grammar entry to start structuring lessons.

form.title: Grammar point details
form.description: Use one example per line in the format: Chinese | Pinyin | Vietnamese meaning

create.title: New grammar point
create.description: Create a grammar explanation with examples and publish controls.

edit.description: Update grammar explanations, examples, and publish state.

lessons.title: Lessons
lessons.description: Manage publishable lessons and compose ordered words and grammar points.
lessons.emptyDescription: Create a lesson to start attaching ordered vocabulary and grammar points.

create.title: New lesson
create.description: Create a lesson and attach ordered words and grammar points.

edit.description: Update lesson metadata, publish state, and ordered composition.

lessonGenerator.title: Auto-generate lesson drafts
lessonGenerator.description: Create draft lessons from the vocabulary database, review the selected words, then save them into the lesson CMS.

form.title: Generation filters
form.description: Choose level, topic tags, and reuse rules before building a candidate lesson.
form.excludePublishedLessonWords: Exclude words already used in published lessons
form.allowReusedWords: Allow words already used in other lessons when needed

review.title: Review generated words
review.description: Inspect the draft set, adjust ordering, replace words, and save a draft lesson for final editing.
review.lessonDraftDescription: Edit the generated title, slug, and summary before saving the draft.
review.previewTableDescription: Words are ordered from easier to harder using the deterministic difficulty score.
review.emptySelection: No words are selected right now. Add replacements back in or regenerate the draft.

articles.title: Articles
articles.description: Manage long-form study notes, comparison articles, and publish state.
articles.emptyDescription: Create the first learning article to start the study note library.

form.title: Article details
form.description: Write safe Markdown with headings, bullet lists, emphasis, and blockquote-style example sections.

create.title: New article
create.description: Create a publishable study note with tags and related content.

edit.description: Update study note content, relationships, and publish state.

topics.title: Topics
topics.description: Manage content categories used by words and lessons.
topics.emptyDescription: Create a topic to organize words and lessons by theme.

radicals.title: Radicals
radicals.description: Manage radical reference data used by vocabulary entries.
radicals.emptyDescription: Create radicals to support richer vocabulary metadata.

import.title: Import words from CSV or JSON
import.description: Upload a validated import file to create vocabulary entries in bulk. Invalid or duplicate rows are skipped with row-level reporting.
import.uploadDescription: Required fields: slug, simplified, hanzi, pinyin, vietnamese_meaning, hsk_level.
import.examplesDescription: JSON imports can provide an examples array. CSV imports can use an examples_json column containing a JSON array of example objects.
import.templatesDescription: Use the bundled templates to avoid formatting mistakes.
import.latestResultDescription: Import summary and row-level validation feedback.
import.noImportYet: No import has been run yet in this session.
